content: Influencers are paid to promote products, like beauty and fashion brands.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Hybrid (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Gli influencer sono pagati per promuovere dei prodotti, come i marchi di bellezza e moda
